attributes.title: [SQL Server OTel] Database I/O
attributes.description: Per-database file I/O bytes, latency, and operations by direction and file type.

This dashboard tracks per-database file I/O:
- I/O bytes and operations by direction (read/write) and file type (ROWS/LOG)
- I/O latency (wait time) per file
- Database and log file I/O trends
- Replication throughput (replica data rate)
